title: Character animation binding prototype
operationalUse: Sample fixture only. Do not use this scenario as operational release evidence for a real project.
userGoal: Connect character animations so the character can use idle and walk states.
milestone: Character has an Animator with idle and walk animation states

expectedDocuments.expected: The character is expected to communicate idle and movement states visually.
The technical design defines animation assets, AnimatorController, parameters, and validation.
The Animator component and any driver script responsibilities are documented.
The player prefab contract records Animator, controller, clips, and required references.
The change set records animation discovery, controller creation or reuse, and assignment.

validationChecks.expected: Available clips and controllers are discovered before creating fallback controller assets.
Animator has a controller with idle and walk states or documented fallback states.
No missing controller, missing clip, or Animator binding errors are reported.
Animation references and validation status are documented.

passCriteria: Animation assets are inspected before creating fallback controller assets.
The target character has an Animator with idle and walk states.
The component and prefab contracts describe the animation setup.
